descriptionHtml:
Fountaine Pajot Saona 47 for sale 2020 | 5 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid 

(With Recent Updates)

If you are searching for a spacious, well-maintained catamaran, the Fountaine Pajot Saona 47 for sale 2020 presents a reliable and comfortable opportunity for private use or professional chartering. Built in 2020 and currently flying the French flag, she remains in good condition. This model is known for combining seaworthiness with onboard comfort for both crew and guests.

(Autopilot, AC, Solar Panels, Generator, Dinghy...)

Key Specifications:

  • Model: Fountaine Pajot Saona 47
  • Year Built: 2020
  • Length Overall: 13.94 metres
  • Beam: 7.70 metres
  • Draft: 1.25 metres
  • Flag: French
  • VAT Status: Not paid
  • Berths: 12
  • Cabins: 5 double cabins + 1 bow access cabin
  • Heads: 6 (5 electric, 1 manual), with 5 holding tanks
  • Fuel Capacity: 600 litres
  • Water Capacity: 800 litres
  • Sails: Battened mainsail (2020), Roller Genoa (2020)
  • Bimini and Sprayhood: New in 2020
  • Solar Panels: 2 x 150W
  • Batteries: 5 x 180W (new in 2025)
  • Engines: 2 x Yanmar 57 hp, 4,100 hours as of November 2025
  • Propellers: 2x 3 blades, fixed
  • Generator: Fischer Panda 12 kWa, 670 hours (November 2025)
  • Air Conditioning: 7 units
  • Instruments: Full set Raymarine, Raymarine Axiom 7 GPS-Plotter, Raymarine autopilot
  • Electric Windlass: Quick 1,500W
  • Deck Shower: Hot and cold
  • Steering: Single wheel
  • Sound System: Fusion with cockpit speakers
  • Dinghy: Plastimo RIB 3.10m with davits (new 2025) and 5 hp outboard
  • Cushions: Full set for cockpit
  • Winches: Lewmar electric winch for the mainsail
  • Fridges: Three (1 outside, 2 inside, including 1 new in 2025)
  • Curtains: In all cabins
  • Bilge Pumps: Automatic switches
  • Mooring Kit: Included with 6 fenders
  • Lazy Bag and Jack: Included
  • Interior Lighting: Courtesy LED
  • VHF Mast Head Antenna: Prewired, with second VHF AIS at helm station
  • Electrical System: 12V/220V, main grid 50Hz, 2000W inverter/charger
  • Fans: 12V in cabins and saloon (x6)
  • Watermaker: 180 L/H, 220V, 50Hz
  • Cockpit Fridge: Yes

Recent updates include a new dinghy with davits and a replaced refrigerator in 2025, highlighting ongoing care and readiness for her next owner.

In summary, the Fountaine Pajot Saona 47 for sale 2020 is ready for immediate use, offering a realistic opportunity for those seeking a good-condition, modern performance catamaran with all essential systems up to date and maintained. Contact us now for more information or to book your viewing!
